title: Adopt a Pet!! [ Dog and Cat ]
description: A resourcepack for Dragns Livestock Overhaul: Pets Addon!
body:
A resourcepack for Dragns Livestock Overhaul: Pets Addon!

🐕 Changes Dogs and cats textures to stylized 🐈
🐾 Many colors and markings to mix-match!
🐕 Dog armor retextured

Stylize your pets while also keeping the new mechanics the mod brings!
